title: About Me
bio: I'm a frontend engineer with over {years} years of experience building production-ready applications for startups and enterprises. I specialize in React, TypeScript, and modern frontend architecture, with a strong focus on creating scalable, maintainable solutions.

My approach combines technical excellence with user-centric design. I'm passionate about crafting interfaces that are not only visually appealing but also performant, accessible, and delightful to use. From implementing complex state management to building comprehensive design systems, I thrive on solving challenging problems that directly impact user experience.
